subject: a "must-win" Senate seat:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
This is big news, Friends: ** _Vox_ just said Kyrsten Sinema's race in Arizona is a "MUST-WIN" if Democrats want to take back the Senate this year, and CNN called this seat the second-most likely to flip in 2018.**
We've got a real shot at turning this red seat blue and taking back the Senate, so we know the GOP and its deep-pocketed donors are going to go all in.
**Republicans are desperate to keep their Senate majority so they can continue rolling back health care, giving tax breaks to the wealthy and confirming extremist Supreme Court nominees. **
This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, so Kyrsten is counting on our grassroots support to make sure she has the resources to win. **Can I count on you to help us raise Kyrsten another $5,000 by midnight? **
**[ _Give $5 or more right now to help Kyrsten Sinema flip Arizona blue and take back the Senate for Democrats._](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ks?refcode=jtk841-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Kyrsten Sinema and Jeanne Shaheen:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ks?refcode=jtk841-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ks?refcode=jtk841-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ks?refcode=jtk841-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4ks?refcode=jtk841-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,

Jeanne

name: The White House
subject: An Executive Order on Faith and Opportunity
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0d5d58d14ab1a9f64761c001d556c157c14c8eb423849c93e5eccc110522fc1656869966d99875e9f1793654b7eff63e12) The White House • May 4, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | Today is National Space Day 2018. [Learn how President Donald J. Trump is making America a leader in space exploration once again.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0d29f1520855efa29b0bccba4d10bc68f0df974ce50a199896a7f4b2ae3b72611ffc84b591d62b9d326beeb23111f64f95)
---|---
• | The President travels to Dallas, Texas, to join the National Rifle Association’s Leadership Forum. [Watch live at 1:15 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0d8382845df81fab025bf6c920688278ae1d4bf6fcbdb2cd033428994d3fbe199902274792612bd8920209bc0320989885)

---
|

## An Executive Order on Faith and Opportunity
**Yesterday, President Trump signed an Executive Order** to ensure that faith-based and community organizations have strong advocates in the White House—and throughout the rest of the Federal Government. The signing coincided with the annual National Day of Prayer at the White House.
**The order creates a White House Faith and Opportunity Initiative** within the Executive Office of the President. Among its tasks will be to reduce burdens on the free exercise of religion in America, as well as apprise the Administration of any failures of the executive branch to comply with religious liberty protections under law.
**“Across the government, we have taken action** to defend the religious conscience of doctors, nurses, teachers, students, and groups like the Little Sisters of the Poor,” the President said yesterday. He added that his “Administration has spoken out against religious persecution around the world.”
[Learn more about President Trump’s newest Executive Order.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0d50977dadee93a9f271e4a1d390d8e812654e0eafb0c4bfb7986d02e2b33a13acd7df300279eed9c88e01bf03008b1b83)
**Watch** : [Highlights of the President leading the National Day of Prayer 2018. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0d5e9c7aeb30943e6baa04661d9364625b08c32246fb1ee1f06fbf112407ed7614c5fb04ca6b85bc1c67dbfdb2ef490780)

---
|

## Introducing Gina Haspel to the American people
**Work in the CIA is often quiet and behind the scenes**. These public servants are instrumental to safeguarding America’s freedoms, yet they go about their jobs expecting little in the way of recognition or public praise for their sacrifices.
**Acting CIA Director Gina Haspel is exactly this kind of patriot**. She has displayed dedication throughout her more than three decades of service, and she’s held a number of senior-level posts in the Agency. Most important, she has the type of extensive counterterrorism experience that America needs in its next CIA Director.
**President Trump has nominated Haspel** to become CIA Director on a permanent basis. The President clearly made the right choice, as reflected by support for Haspel from public officials across the spectrum—including a number of Obama Administration appointees.
[See why Gina Haspel is the right woman to lead the CIA.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0dbb1878f7d1c8444be72863d168661cd89a2bded61685aa81a151faac7934c892887a5ae0539d2f83f20bf45d43b7a3ec)
**Go deeper** : [ “One of the most accomplished officers of her generation”](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0dd7f75096174e9a7311ec22a7042fdac8ccf71f63537c9a0c3810775f4adabc300db333ad97b18e3ac4c2ef4103266321)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump at the National Day of Prayer** | May 3, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0dbd76d0898ef327325f5c9b9bf3d3d1b32632ba967e80f0e4ac31bc0d1a0c344ab0746f1ea264ccf19a8172581db381c5) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0f185c97fab7dc0defe5159545b33a8ffeb9054615bb8af61d2573f25ad79b6bc6b4beda648626c889a46df95e56cbf31748b0b16febf115) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48ae533fe735f5716f893019b802a78a7e4e18809059f6fb05a4fda157446ceab8911d19522e8f911747cc12b069a83dd5a98488e879d3d4e)
---

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Out & About in Maryland
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501134228%2501May%2bE-Newsletter%250114288.9906856.3936472.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501134228%2501May%2bE-Newsletter%250114288.9906856.3936472.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **May 4, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | | When I am not at Senate hearings and working on legislation, I try to get around Maryland to talk to folks about what really matters to them, so I can take their thoughts and concerns back to the Senate. And whether it's welcoming Marylanders to my office on Capitol Hill or meeting you in the state, I'm grateful for the input I receive from my constituents. One issue that has been both before the Congress and on the minds of Marylanders is the need for robust consumer protections to prevent people from being cheated out of their hard-earned money. In 2008, after the financial meltdown and shenanigans on Wall Street, Congress established the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) as a watchdog agency to hold big banks accountable. The CFPB is supposed to protect consumers from the dishonest practices of some financial institutions. And it has been successful. Remember, this is the agency that caught and fined Wells Fargo for defrauding consumers by opening and charging them for fake accounts. Unfortunately, GOP members of Congress and President Trump have been trying to dismantle this important agency. When they did not succeed in eliminating it outright, they set out to destroy it from within by appointing former Congressman Mick Mulvaney to become its Acting Director. As a member of Congress, Mulvaney had called the CFPB a "sick joke," and he has tried to make it into one. Last week Director Mulvaney made clear that he is not working to protect consumers; he is working to protect big banks. Speaking before a large group of banking lobbyists, he was caught on tape saying, "We had a hierarchy in my office in Congress: If you were a lobbyist who never gave us money, I didn't talk to you. If you're a lobbyist who gave us money, I might talk to you." This merely underscores the importance of keeping an eye on Mulvaney and protecting the mission of the CFPB. I serve on the Senate Banking Committee, which oversees the CFPB, and I can assure you that I will continue to hold Mulvaney's feet to the fire. And, as mentioned immediately below, I have teamed up with Maryland Attorney General Brian Frosh to hold a series of discussions around the state to provide Marylanders with advice and tips on how you can best protect yourselves from con artists and others trying to cheat you out of your money. Chris Van Hollen
---
### Protecting Consumers
Attorney General Frosh and I have continued our series of Consumer Protection Discussions, with our second event in Williamsport at the Homewood retirement community and our third event at UMUC in Prince George's County. At both events, we discussed consumers' rights and how to keep your information safe. But we didn't just leave it at that - we answered questions on everything from the Republican tax law to protecting Social Security and Medicare. Keep an eye on my website for the details of our next Forum - I hope you can join us!
### **Supporting Jobs and Training Programs in Maryland**
On a visit to Stanley Black & Decker's tool division headquarters in Towson, I was able to see some of the innovations they're working on and learn about their plan to create 400 jobs at their new facility in Baltimore County. I'm looking forward to their continued success. I also toured the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 26 in Lanham, which provides top-notch training and apprenticeship programs in the electrical field. It is a great pathway to good-paying jobs that are much in demand. Another organization I visited, The Training Source in Seat Pleasant, provides employment training and job placement assistance - its services range from teaching students how to create a resume and use Microsoft Office, to lending job applicants professional attire. I met with many of the successful Training Source graduates and heard just how much this program impacted them and their careers. I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure we invest in job training programs, growing our economy, and supporting businesses in our state.
### **Providing Opportunities to All**
I toured Marian House, a Baltimore nonprofit that provides rehabilitative services and housing to homeless women and was inspired by the strength and resilience of the women I met there. Since its founding over 30 years ago, Marian House has become a national leader in helping women and children in need. Nearby, in Baltimore County, I visited Vehicles for Change, another inspiring nonprofit that has two programs to help individuals achieve financial independence. One program provides vehicles to individuals so they can get to and from work and make ends meet. Another program provides technical training in auto repair to enable individuals, including many seeking a second chance after prison, to embark on a successful, in-demand career. These programs are doing outstanding work, and I'm doing everything I can to make sure they have the federal support that they need.
### **Highlighting the Importance of Education**
In Beltsville, I had the opportunity to visit with special education students and staff at James Duckworth Regional School. While I was there, I read a book to the students about the three branches of government on an accessible "smart board," which underscored how important technology is in the classroom - and I even got quizzed about my own job. I also participated in the guest lecture series at Frostburg State University in Western Maryland. It was great to answer questions from students who are engaged in our political process, well-versed in current issues, and interested in making a difference. During my visit, I spent time with the Frostburg State faculty and learned about their new degree programs for health professionals, which will help provide Western Maryland and other regions with qualified healthcare workers. I will continue fighting for investments in education and rural health services across our state.
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14288.9906856.3936472.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14288.9906856.3936472.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14288.9906856.3936472.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14288.9906856.3936472.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326)[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14288.9906856.3936472.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---

Another organization I visited, The Training Source in Seat Pleasant, provides employment training and job placement assistance - its services range from teaching students how to create a resume and use Microsoft Office, to lending job applicants professional attire. I met with many of the successful Training Source graduates and heard just how much this program impacted them and their careers. I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure we invest in job training programs, growing our economy, and supporting businesses in our state. Providing Opportunities to All I toured Marian House, a Baltimore nonprofit that provides rehabilitative services and housing to homeless women and was inspired by the strength and resilience of the women I met there. Since its founding over 30 years ago, Marian House has become a national leader in helping women and children in need. Nearby, in Baltimore County, I visited Vehicles for Change, another inspiring nonprofit that has two programs to help individuals achieve financial independence. One program provides vehicles to individuals so they can get to and from work and make ends meet. Another program provides technical training in auto repair to enable individuals, including many seeking a second chance after prison, to embark on a successful, in-demand career. These programs are doing outstanding work, and I'm doing everything I can to make sure they have the federal support that they need. Highlighting the Importance of Education In Beltsville, I had the opportunity to visit with special education students and staff at James Duckworth Regional School. While I was there, I read a book to the students about the three branches of government on an accessible "smart board," which underscored how important technology is in the classroom - and I even got quizzed about my own job. I also participated in the guest lecture series at Frostburg State University in Western Maryland. It was great to answer questions from students who are engaged in our political process, well-versed in current issues, and interested in making a difference. During my visit, I spent time with the Frostburg State faculty and learned about their new degree programs for health professionals, which will help provide Western Maryland and other regions with qualified healthcare workers. I will continue fighting for investments in education and rural health services across our state. |

name: Team Scholten
subject: Peter - Tour stop in Salix! SATURDAY 5/5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
We wanted to let you know that J.D. has an upcoming visit planned in an area near you!
As part of the nonstop **39 County Movement-Building Tour** until June 5, our Winnebago RV “Sioux City Sue” will be bringing J.D. and Team Scholten to Salix at Dave Dawson's Town Meeting to support his campaign for Iowa Senate District 3. If you can make it out to help support the Democratic movement in the 4th District, we’d love to see you there too!
Who:
**Dave Dawson, J.D. Scholten, and YOU!
Everybody is welcome**

What:
**Dave Dawson for Iowa Senate Salix Town Meeting**

Where:
**Walker's of Salix**
**301 Tipton, Salix, IA**

When:
**Saturday, May 5**
**10:00-11:00 am **
You can find more information about the event on Facebook [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1153683/6408017/1479487918?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTUxODJkYy1hYjRmLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzg1ZTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6IOwD1sNSNxo0bXxZCpjBUWyNbV1TjKEztTu7ZKzOA=). Please share and invite friends!

Let us know if you'll be there by replying to this email. Hope to see you there!
Team Scholten

name: Keith Ellison
subject: You haven't donated yet this year. Can you contribute today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
We can't let up -- not even for a second -- especially not when Democrats have so much at stake this year.
---
Health care as a right and not a privilege. Action on gun violence. An economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy.

The only way we'll make progress on any of this is by electing Democrats in all 50 states this year -- and right now I need to know you're part of this fight, Derek.

**Make your first $3 donation of 2018 if you're ready to elect Democrats across the country.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d4e/2588200368/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join_the_fight?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d4f/2588200368/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join_the_fight?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d4c/2588200368/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join_the_fight?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d4d/2588200368/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join_the_fight?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d4a/2588200368/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/join_the_fight?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d4b/2588200368/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join_the_fight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")
** You know as well as I do what we're up against. The Republican Party thinks only certain people should have health care. They would rather prop up the gun lobby than take basic steps to prevent mass shootings from happening. And the tax plan they passed last year is already lining the pockets of their wealthy campaign contributors.

I don't know about you, Derek, but I've had enough -- and if we come together, we can change course in this country. It's gonna require a lot of hard work, which is why I'm asking you to step up right now.

**[This is a pivotal moment for Democrats. Make your first $3 contribution of 2018 right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d48/2588200368/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join_the_fight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+This+is+a+pivotal+moment+for+Democrats+M&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd")**

In solidarity,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522867/4067b0a/5826d2b5e/7e446d54/2588200368/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180504_ke_nd&source=em_20180504_ke_nd&refcode=em_20180504_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d65bc81e87&e=19cebfe173 Forward to a Friend (http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d65bc81e87&e=19cebfe173)
SAY WHAT?!

Gov. Scott Presents Plan to Prevent $58 Million in Property Tax Increases & Save $300 Million Dollars

Democrats Say "We Don't Have Time for That"
Governor Phil Scott on Tuesday unveiled a plan to prevent a $58 million dollar property tax increase this year, and save $300 million dollars over five years that can be reinvested in education quality initiatives and lower taxes.

"Vermont has great schools, it has great teachers, it delivers a good education, but our demographic challenges are contributing to a K-12 system that's inefficient, it's outdated and it's really unaffordable," said Administration Secretary Susanne Young.

But the urgency and interest to act to save Vermonters $58 million this year -- and hundreds of millions over 5 years -- while improving opportunity for all of Vermont’s students isn't shared by Democratic leaders in the State House. Many claiming they "don't have time" to take up any new proposals, regardless of how beneficial it may be to Vermonters.

“It’s absurd that we would even begin to look at this at this point,” said Sen. Richard McCormack (D/P-Windsor).

Apparently he's already looking forward to vacation because he noted he would put this proposal in his” summer reading file.”

To be clear, there’s no state law or rule that directs an end date to the legislative session. In fact, Senator McCormack had no problem postponing his summer break to support the creation of Act 60 back in 1997. In fact, Act 60 was introduced in mid-May and the session ran until June 13^th. Now the Democrats can't be bothered to take a few extra days to save you millions?

Sen. Richard Sears (D – Bennington) bemoaned the cost savings and affordability measures presented by the Governor, saying: “To go through this a second year in a row? It’s not right.”

Perhaps the most incredible comment came from Senate Education Chair, Sen. Philip Baruth (D – Chittenden) who thought taking up the Governor’s proposal to save you millions, “begins to push it into the realm of more than human beings can accomplish in two weeks.” Really? Doesn't seem that hard to us. Especially considering the Governor's plan contains some of the Legislature's own ideas, and others he offered months ago.

The bottom line is clear: Democratic leadership isn't going to be interested in preventing a $58 million property tax hike -- or saving $300 million dollars over the next five years -- unless they hear from YOU.
https://twitter.com/PhilScott4VT
https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/?fref=ts
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOkgjHw4Pguv-Q2ScZ0KSxg

============================================================
Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

body:
Dear Friend of Nina for PA,

Who doesn't love a good Flashback Friday- especially when it involves President Obama?!

He gave me his vote of confidence when he appointed me to his Advisory Commission on Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders, and I hope you'll give me your vote of confidence on May 15th!

Believe it or not, we are just 11 days away from the primary. We need your support NOW to help us reach voters across the state with our message of inclusivity, change, and progress for all Pennsylvanians.

Victory is within reach, and we are counting on outstanding supporters like __you__ to push us past the finish line on May 15th!

Thanks in advance for your generosity-

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | **[Planned Parenthood SUES to block Trump from slashing funds[1]](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d87/1564982907/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Planned+Parenthood+SUES+to+block+Trump+f")

Sign immediately: [Stand with Planned Parenthood ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d86/1564982907/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Stand+with+Planned+Parenthoodnbsprarr")**
---
Look -- we have some URGENT news for you:

**[Planned Parenthood is suing the Trump administration over his plans to gut the Title X program.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d85/1564982907/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Planned+Parenthood+is+suing+the+Trump+ad")**

Trump's cuts would put over 4 million Americans' health care at risk. That's why Planned Parenthood is fighting back -- but they need our support.
**[Sign your name right now and stand with Planned Parenthood ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d84/1564982907/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Sign+your+name+right+now+and+stand+with+")**
[](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d8b/1564982907/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5")
---
Over 90,000 Pennsylvanians have been helped by Planned Parenthood.

And as a former Planned Parenthood volunteer, Governor Wolf knows how vital the organization is to women's health care. He's been a fierce advocate for women's rights from the start.

But Trump and his allies in Pennsylvania are more determined than ever on rolling back women's rights.

**[_Every single Republican running for governor in Pennsylvania agrees with Trump -- they want to defund Planned Parenthood._](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d8a/1564982907/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Every+single+Republican+running+for+gove")**

That's why we need to stand with Governor Wolf and show that thousands of grassroots supporters in Pennsylvania support Planned Parenthood.

**[Please, sign your name to stand with Planned Parenthood:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d89/1564982907/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=7+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+sign+your+name+to+stand+")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Stand-Planned-Parenthood](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd53/73a2bc12/3dcaa0f9/1fcd4d88/1564982907/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/stand-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180504_pp_clk_clq_act_sue_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=8+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomStandPlannedParen")**

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | [Planned Parenthood SUES to block Trump from slashing funds[1]]( "") Sign immediately: "" Look -- we have some URGENT news for you: "" Trump's cuts would put over 4 million Americans' health care at risk. That's why Planned Parenthood is fighting back -- but they need our support. "+" "" Over 90,000 Pennsylvanians have been helped by Planned Parenthood. And as a former Planned Parenthood volunteer, Governor Wolf knows how vital the organization is to women's health care. He's been a fierce advocate for women's rights from the start. But Trump and his allies in Pennsylvania are more determined than ever on rolling back women's rights. "" That's why we need to stand with Governor Wolf and show that thousands of grassroots supporters in Pennsylvania support Planned Parenthood. "+" "" Thanks for signing, Wolf for PA [[1] NPR.Planned Parenthood Sues To Block Trump 's 'Radical Shift' In Family Planning Program. body:
In just one week, Wisconsin Republicans will go to state convention and make their voices heard on their preferred candidate for Senate.
Friend,

In just one week, Wisconsin Republicans will go to state convention and make their voices heard on their preferred candidate for Senate.

I’m so proud of what we have accomplished together as grassroots Republicans since we nominated Scott Walker at convention in 2010.

But because Tammy Baldwin prefers obstruction to action, the U.S. Senate doesn’t boast a similar track record of successes. We need to send someone from Wisconsin who has proven they will do what they say and deliver on building the wall, defending the unborn and protecting our Constitutional rights.
[CHIP IN TO HELP LEAH NOW >>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=772184ba860f4a7c982d1932e149fb08&_e=Mmxvaa9Pk-ZpNyoTk9E_poYfuOqny2JaREXmC1Usu4DzfkN-GKJOKd_jjk-J_nTToLpF--c0l61ULvRdNGD0506k7UfcMvQV42hKSJr4-fyP7DZvoprDoYPh9xbVlcX3m71mjKKLhwTlm-c4QyxEpy6CM5IRSl-NQe7-_V5Y0C91DS2a3-wg1Hs1r_meu8XlPNuAU7Q843uaJynIOAVylJgVeJu0xAQat-BscVtYYRlVbFQOdQbFJxX5s_JpXYE5eD5nY5TzZYbZ7FyjyrnR5RloSA--mLpJ4rQbc2Ff3IUWdpibOajSRDWnZr-fDgpVS-mJANJmla9yKHsirG5t08w6R2vMviKAyn3FrPTvnivhNRysizgwJw-6oGUXjP7K54b9DzZMW3Ko8idsHRJ_Xdoy5w6AT1UCdzOVs_X5N9g%3D)

[**Can you be one of my first contributors by donating now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=772184ba860f4a7c982d1932e149fb08&_e=Mmxvaa9Pk-ZpNyoTk9E_poYfuOqny2JaREXmC1Usu4DzfkN-GKJOKd_jjk-J_nTToLpF--c0l61ULvRdNGD0506k7UfcMvQV42hKSJr4-fyP7DZvoprDoYPh9xbVlcX3m71mjKKLhwTlm-c4QyxEpy6CM5IRSl-NQe7-_V5Y0C91DS2a3-wg1Hs1r_meu8XlHt6p0T79wK59lkANygoEQpo_Er5PNsjEn6_UyNzeAqCaBpWX9BbQJciFnIenzpzOYEK3IGvnI6DOF55PLyKAYeDYWqIui-DWSqHIZehYaKGFC0YS6V3DqiFi29T_-1mpuv_k144d_k5eVEyWrhE_qQqKD4X5Iz2HMK3cJprxXxbLCmHYwWfyaVvaeQ7QEGliJeiSoTrTO_cBJRUmw2WG_QO2AEimUOTbv7HdqDLTmJM%3D)

Friend, I know the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America First when we voted for President Trump last November.

But politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She ignores the concerns of our veterans. She won’t build the wall. She won’t protect the lives of the unborn. She stands in the way of Obamacare repeal. And Friend, she didn’t even vote for tax reform!

That’s why we really have to work together to ensure victory next week: [**https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=772184ba860f4a7c982d1932e149fb08&_e=Mmxvaa9Pk-ZpNyoTk9E_poYfuOqny2JaREXmC1Usu4DzfkN-GKJOKd_jjk-J_nTToLpF--c0l61ULvRdNGD0506k7UfcMvQV42hKSJr4-fyP7DZvoprDoYPh9xbVlcX3m71mjKKLhwTlm-c4QyxEpy6CM5IRSl-NQe7-_V5Y0C91DS2a3-wg1Hs1r_meu8XlTuGBWLeZJyhhRMq3cjL3-3TkiK3prVQtyN6Sm9HuTQRW8S5sVnsQ8vnJ-es4Kh1nFDGjnNErmINvfC85oIyk4OuHDLpDgqFhfiERFRuJ5iF6BlDURzzIZwblEkHH6M_4HbrNLw86JnwlCCXAjKioglaJPKQS8gHwPESif_CF_zlaKq8GMOPeHil9aGJ4jiNKbRjExRn_kzRLjL7WAcwI1vogA_n8vN1rG6sY3ShG3iM%3D)

This goal of $25,000 dollars for the convention will help us get our message out there and win the support of the Republican party.

I hope you’ll chip in today.

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=772184ba860f4a7c982d1932e149fb08&_e=Mmxvaa9Pk-ZpNyoTk9E_pvrf1Z1eMIjzXKi_43gHu9jzX_XeGgi4zA8oBxxCBmULiVjeA-c08iE-P62HSXZJJp3fxT7xGUMs6-xP3WXzdxn77GiGVsd0ULEqKS9mpVXym-2ESQCu6k3JsD7Chb3v61ecVhewxFfi1ckhCmfT7hDb9vf0e_L0B9Gvu7hS9nyDJxW1w0GigBLnvgQEgpHhYoqzLre20QJ6JaTMZSreYh7PeiaNSZiT5Pswin19fcQf3y-lSB_aO02RsS960Bs0C_7JtjUTmSRz5CMJ7d8MxOAdzF9TK19yTQRX30zmm4hAjDxbX0ztvjErAk_rwZzexk2c_zOsHPm5cGtHP2w2QL8auPcp2U1NvBFR_PwRyjs6) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=772184ba860f4a7c982d1932e149fb08&_e=Mmxvaa9Pk-ZpNyoTk9E_pvrf1Z1eMIjzXKi_43gHu9hSWn1RW-bMQa7KU6TJ27jlbfMwA16EdfydNXP_H-4VdV6w5cNnZKRJZxiz0L3S6CL4Z8v5sIXlZdxjVBD404dD5XVshO_wNBhol_zA2ZvDy-1YC8HlhChl3BEV1k8wuWj3zX2Gd4_u_ctOrplWxz_qWu3Ya0fVMeSIoVZK5-rEhSp86c90jChph9_BJ-b3TQd3rk9_vsQqk90svPMpzqz9dWC4EQ2HPA_8S40fJUY7Cri6YPTq0Z2U4LpljuTVmzCayBbVvSvV23UuUJNgEygNW3Vktc5zmeMoonKduGlaqBr07pDcaUoPbgsu9MnA4Dca80Aij7zHzqC5ok_AQMOX) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: In just one week, Wisconsin Republicans will go to state convention and make their voices heard on their preferred candidate for Senate. Friend, In just one week, Wisconsin Republicans will go to state convention and make their voices heard on their preferred candidate for Senate. I’m so proud of what we have accomplished together as grassroots Republicans since we nominated Scott Walker at convention in 2010. But because Tammy Baldwin prefers obstruction to action, the U.S. Senate doesn’t boast a similar track record of successes. We need to send someone from Wisconsin who has proven they will do what they say and deliver on building the wall, defending the unborn and protecting our Constitutional rights. We’ve got just one week to get our message out there to gain all the support we need before convention. So I’m going ALL OUT and I need your help. I’ve set up a CONVENTION FUND with a goal of raising $25,000 by May 11, the day before the convention. Friend, I know the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America First when we voted for President Trump last November. But politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She ignores the concerns of our veterans. She won’t build the wall. She won’t protect the lives of the unborn. She stands in the way of Obamacare repeal. And Friend, she didn’t even vote for tax reform! That’s why we really have to work together to ensure victory next week: I know what it takes to change politics. I worked side by side with Gov. Walker to shake up Madison and bring the conservative change they said would never be possible. This goal of $25,000 dollars for the convention will help us get our message out there and win the support of the Republican party. I hope you’ll chip in today. Let’s win this thing. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: 1 year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1K6jzUaf9LX4moGKpyRFEIhCdAS03E_EzYgJAhPVjxE=/6gsPvE-PB4oH9ojRbjb74CG-iZwN-CH7sqIEl_lOhK4=?gpsid=11_36_295&ms=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)
Dear Peter,

Exactly one year ago, House Republicans in DC gave us further proof that they would not work together to fix the problems our country faced. Instead, they voted to strip health insurance from over 200,000 Kansans, skyrocket premiums by double digits, eliminate protections for the 1.2 million Kansans who suffer from pre-existing conditions, and impose an "age tax" on Kansas seniors, allowing them to charge Kansans over 50 up to five times more for their healthcare.

There's no denying that our healthcare system has flaws -- but Paul Davis knows that if something is broken, you fix it. You don't obliterate it and start over.

**[It's time for truly cooperative, comprehensive solutions to our healthcare problems. Add your name now to fight for affordable, accessible healthcare for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1K6jzUaf9LX4moGKpyRFEIhCdAS03E_EzYgJAhPVjxE=/6gsPvE-PB4oH9ojRbjb74CG-iZwN-CH7sqIEl_lOhK4=?gpsid=11_36_295&ms=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)**

We need new leaders in Congress who will fight to fix the systems we have in place now instead of refusing to work together and starting from scratch.

Paul Davis is ready to reach across the aisle and find the best solutions for Kansans and Americans across the country -- but without help from supporters like you, we'll be in for more of the same failures.

**[Demand that Congress works together on critical problems like our healthcare system -- add your name today to find solutions for all Americans.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1K6jzUaf9LX4moGKpyRFEIhCdAS03E_EzYgJAhPVjxE=/6gsPvE-PB4oH9ojRbjb74CG-iZwN-CH7sqIEl_lOhK4=?gpsid=11_36_295&ms=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_ACArep_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)**

Thank you,

Team Davis

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Tomorrow, We Fight For 55
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/Fight%20for%2055%20pic%20stamp.png]

Fellow Democrat,

As you know, tomorro w is the last day to Early Vote in the 2018 Primary Election. Take a friend, a form of ID and go vote for Democrats who will continue the fight for working families.

It's no secret that when West Virginia workers come together, we can accomplish anything. During the 2018 Legislative Session teachers, school service personnel, and fellow state workers joined together to secure a 5% pay raise across the board for not only teachers and school service personnel, but all state employees.

Tomorrow on 5/5, we pledge along with supporters from all 55 counties to continue the Fight for 55.

If the Legislative Session taught us one thing, it's that through the Republican majority's attacks on West Virginia workers and their families, we can fight back and we can win.

You said it best, "enough is enough."

Join us tomorrow to continue to be #55United and #55Strong, by joining the #WVFightfor55!

Together, with support from all 55 counties in West Virginia, we can stop Republican Leadership and corporate bosses from putting the top 1% first and leaving everyone else behind.

Watch for us tomorrow at 5 p.m.!

Sincerely,

WVD P Fight for 55

subject: FWD: Giuliani exposes Trump's lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Making sure you saw this, team. We need as many voices as possible demanding that Congress move to protect Mueller before Trump shuts down the Russia investigation.

[**You can sign on here to make your voice heard. Demand Congress protect Mueller!**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-congress-protect-mueller?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+You+can+sign+on+here+to+make+your+voice+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2")

_**Begin forwarded message:**_

Everyone -- Rudy Giuliani just admitted that Donald Trump personally reimbursed his "fixer" Michael Cohen for $130,000 that Cohen spent to silence Stormy Daniels.

**That could be a major campaign finance violation, and Trump is FURIOUS word is out.**

**When Trump goes off the rails, he lashes out at anyone and everyone in his way. That means we 're one step closer to an already impending constitutional crisis.**

Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein and Special Counsel Robert Mueller are directly in the line of fire. Trump is itching to FIRE THEM, end the Russia investigation, and protect himself from any questions into his campaign's collusion with Russia.

[**We need Congress to move swiftly to protect Mueller and our democracy from Trump. SIGN ON HERE and tell Congress to protect the special investigation!**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-congress-protect-mueller?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+We+need+Congress+to+move+swiftly+to+prot&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2")

Trump is already taking to Twitter to defend himself and threaten Mueller. He warned of soon having no choice but to "get involved" using the "powers granted to the presidency."

That means only one thing: He's desperate to end the investigation, and firing Rosenstein or Mueller is not off the table.

[**Tell Congress: Protect Robert Mueller 's investigation NOW.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-congress-protect-mueller?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Tell+Congress+Protect+Robert+Muellerrsqu&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180504_1_2")

We cannot let Trump or his allies escape justice. They are not above the law.

Thanks for taking a stand.

Florida Democrats

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Coming Together
body:
The next time you hear from me, we'll have our Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate. And even before we know whether it'll be... | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Coming Together_** The next time you hear from me, we'll have our Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate. And before we even know whether that'll be Mike Braun, Luke Messer, or Todd Rokita, there's a few things I can tell you about our party's nominee:

**1.)**_He'll be a strong conservative. When it comes time to stand strong for Hoosier values in Washington, our nominee will _always_ be there front-and-center._

**2.)**_He'll be a steadfast supporter of the the Trump-Pence agenda, working work President Trump and Vice President Pence to continue providing greater opportunities for all Hoosiers and Americans._

**3.)** _He'll have a track record of delivering real results, whether that's at the Indiana Statehouse, the U.S. Capitol, or in the private sector. _

**4.)**_He'll provide the firewall protecting the U.S. Senate from obstructionist Democrats who want to cause gridlock in Washington and block the real reforms that President Trump and Vice President Pence are delivering. _

This is in direct contrast to Democrat Joe Donnelly. When it matters most (like when he voted against letting us keep more of our hard-earned money), Democrat Donnelly has built a record of voting in lock-step with his Democrat bosses, Chuck Shumer and Nancy Pelosi. He's not a conservative, and Hoosiers are already [saying loud-and-clear](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b6531073d&e=1acd9bb3d6) that they want someone new representing us.

That's why, next week when the calendar turns from May 8 to May 9, I'll be there standing shoulder-to-shoulder with our party's nominee for U.S. Senate. And I invite you to join me.

Next week, it's time to come together. It's time to defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly.

-Kyle Hupfer

_Pictured: Chairman Kyle Hupfer snaps a photo with Indiana's national committeeman to the Republican National Committee (RNC), John Hammond, and our national committeewoman, Anne Hathaway. This week, they're coming together with their counterparts from across the country to learn about the latest advancements in campaign technology, strategy and infrastructure at the RNC Spring Meeting in Miami._
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Governor Holcomb's Birthday Week Delivers for Hoosiers_**
When you're having a birthday, it's usually customary for people to give you gifts. But Governor Holcomb turned that custom upside down this week, as he celebrated his 50th birthday by continuing to give, give, and give to Hoosiers.

It may be hard to top last week's [1,000 new Hoosier tech jobs](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4e98ee7706&e=1acd9bb3d6), but this week Governor Holcomb [announced a new initiative](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8e3a9a49de&e=1acd9bb3d6) that will literally save the lives of countless mothers and babies by adding one more tool to attack the drug epidemic.
Through a state grant, the Community Health Network in Indianapolis is expanding a new program that will combat opioid addiction among expectant mothers and babies born addicted to opioids, with the goal of healthier moms and babies.

Thanks, Governor Holcomb, for working during your birthday week to grow such an important program here at home, and for your work to help save Hoosier lives!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Register to Attend the 2018 Spring Party Dinner!**_
May is a great time to be a Hoosier Republican! Our 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner is set, and you'll want to [reserve your seats NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b9a995f3e4&e=1acd9bb3d6), and be in the center of all the action.
**Monday, May 21
JW Marriott, Indianapolis**
We're bringing in two Hoosiers -- who have gone on to become key players within the Trump-Pence administration -- to provide an inside look into the White House, the 2016 campaign, how Gov. Pence became Vice President Pence, and how they helped deliver national victory on that legendary night in November.

It's going to be a great event, [so reserve your seats now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8615cdc712&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_President Trump Rally on Thursday!_**
The primary isn't the only reason to get excited about next week! President Donald Trump will be [holding a rally](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=52c9aabbbc&e=1acd9bb3d6) in South Bend next Thursday!

He'll be showcasing the big benefits Hoosiers are already seeing today thanks to the president's historic tax cuts, and will deliver a big message to make sure Indiana provides the firewall we need to protect the U.S. Senate.

It's going to be a big event, so make sure to [reserve your ticket](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9223cf7ec5&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[May 4](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c978647e6&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Noble County Lincoln Day Dinner with Chicks on the Right
[May 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1336c12034&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Putnam County Lincoln Day Dinner with Auditor of State Tera Klutz
May 8 - Primary Election Day
[May 10](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=69a289cf2b&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- President Trump Rally in South Bend
[May 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1245a82c2b&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner
[June 8-9](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a6c63680b&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville
---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_
**Governor Eric Holcomb** [explains why Northwest Indiana is so important](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4ea7ba0d05&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[encourages Hoosiers to explore Indiana ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=54100405c5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson** [points Hoosiers to INBiz for all business assistance](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=72a1a672f4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Curtis Hill**[vows to defend the state](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fef72fd463&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young** [stands up for journalists in Burma](http:////www.young.senate.gov/newsroom/press-releases/young-stands-up-for-journalists-imprisoned-in-burma)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[praises President Trump for****](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a5d19b138&e=1acd9bb3d6)[tariff exemption](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3e6ee08139&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [leads bipartisan letter to NATO](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8bffa870b1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita**[is demanding Mueller to provide evidence of collusion](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9f11de2865&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks**[explains how 5G technology is improving the agriculture industry](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=65d287324a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer** [j](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=921f11f6b9&e=1acd9bb3d6)[oins Fox and Friends after nominating Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9d7975e0bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon** [shares exciting news for Evansville's workfor](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb29b6e9cb&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a4d3342cc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** [explains how much stronger our nation is with tax reform](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eee8c42ed8&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| President Donald Trump and Governor Eric Holcomb have declared this [Small Business Week](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=89ae67e610&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

We're excited to celebrate this engine of our Hoosier economy, with small businesses employing 1.2 million Hoosiers statewide.

Thanks to President Trump's tax cuts and the work of our Republican majority at the Statehouse, small businesses are booming in Indiana!

| |

| South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg [put politics before the people in his own community](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2d29a6a995&e=1acd9bb3d6) last week.

After the South Bend Common Council approved a zoning decision for the Women's Health Center, which provides an alternative to abortion, Buttigieg vetoed the decision. This limits health care options for women in South Bend.

Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer is calling on Donnelly to denounce this decision, and for the Common Council to override the veto.

clean_body: The next time you hear from me, we'll have our Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate. And even before we know whether it'll be... | | | | | | | Coming Together The next time you hear from me, we'll have our Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate. And before we even know whether that'll be Mike Braun, Luke Messer, or Todd Rokita, there's a few things I can tell you about our party's nominee: 1.)He'll be a strong conservative. When it comes time to stand strong for Hoosier values in Washington, our nominee will always be there front-and-center. 2.)He'll be a steadfast supporter of the the Trump-Pence agenda, working work President Trump and Vice President Pence to continue providing greater opportunities for all Hoosiers and Americans. 3.) He'll have a track record of delivering real results, whether that's at the Indiana Statehouse, the U.S. Capitol, or in the private sector. 4.)He'll provide the firewall protecting the U.S. Senate from obstructionist Democrats who want to cause gridlock in Washington and block the real reforms that President Trump and Vice President Pence are delivering. This is in direct contrast to Democrat Joe Donnelly. When it matters most (like when he voted against letting us keep more of our hard-earned money), Democrat Donnelly has built a record of voting in lock-step with his Democrat bosses, Chuck Shumer and Nancy Pelosi. He's not a conservative, and Hoosiers are already that they want someone new representing us. That's why, next week when the calendar turns from May 8 to May 9, I'll be there standing shoulder-to-shoulder with our party's nominee for U.S. Senate. And I invite you to join me. Next week, it's time to come together. It's time to defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly. -Kyle Hupfer Pictured: Chairman Kyle Hupfer snaps a photo with Indiana's national committeeman to the Republican National Committee (RNC), John Hammond, and our national committeewoman, Anne Hathaway. This week, they're coming together with their counterparts from across the country to learn about the latest advancements in campaign technology, strategy and infrastructure at the RNC Spring Meeting in Miami. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Governor Holcomb's Birthday Week Delivers for Hoosiers When you're having a birthday, it's usually customary for people to give you gifts. But Governor Holcomb turned that custom upside down this week, as he celebrated his 50th birthday by continuing to give, give, and give to Hoosiers. It may be hard to top last week's , but this week Governor Holcomb that will literally save the lives of countless mothers and babies by adding one more tool to attack the drug epidemic. Through a state grant, the Community Health Network in Indianapolis is expanding a new program that will combat opioid addiction among expectant mothers and babies born addicted to opioids, with the goal of healthier moms and babies. Thanks, Governor Holcomb, for working during your birthday week to grow such an important program here at home, and for your work to help save Hoosier lives! | | | Register to Attend the 2018 Spring Party Dinner! May is a great time to be a Hoosier Republican! Our 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner is set, and you'll want to , and be in the center of all the action. Monday, May 21 JW Marriott, Indianapolis We're bringing in two Hoosiers -- who have gone on to become key players within the Trump-Pence administration -- to provide an inside look into the White House, the 2016 campaign, how Gov. Pence became Vice President Pence, and how they helped deliver national victory on that legendary night in November. It's going to be a great event, ! | | | President Trump Rally on Thursday! The primary isn't the only reason to get excited about next week! President Donald Trump will be in South Bend next Thursday! He'll be showcasing the big benefits Hoosiers are already seeing today thanks to the president's historic tax cuts, and will deliver a big message to make sure Indiana provides the firewall we need to protect the U.S. Senate. name: Team Donnelly
subject: Our response to Rep. Braun's millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
"The former state representative and multimillionaire businessman [Rep. Mike Braun] will have thrown $6 million into TV ads, more than Rokita and Messer have spent combined." -- Washington Post |
---

| | | **"The former state representative and multimillionaire businessman [Mike Braun] will have thrown $6 million into TV ads, more than Rokita and Messer have spent combined."**
\-- _Washington Post_ , 5/2/18
---
**[But just $6 can help Joe fight back. Pitch in>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f5/617873347/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180504nd&amount=6")**
Peter,

Nearly 23,000 of you last year alone (!) chipped in to support Joe. Meanwhile, one of his opponents is relying heavily on a single wealthy donor: himself. **Joe may not have millions to pump into his campaign, but he understands that being able to write yourself a big check doesn 't mean you have the support of Hoosiers.**

So in response to Rep. Mike Braun's $6 million he's thrown into his campaign, we're launching a $6 drive to make it clear that **Joe stands with middle-class families, not special interest donors who are more at home with people like Rep. Braun. Will you donate and help us keep a fighter for Hoosiers in the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f4/617873347/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?express_lane=true&refcode=20180504nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f7/617873347/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?express_lane=true&refcode=20180504nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f6/617873347/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?express_lane=true&refcode=20180504nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f1/617873347/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?express_lane=true&refcode=20180504nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f0/617873347/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180504nd")**
We won't sugarcoat this, Peter -- it's going to be a tough race no matter who wins Tuesday's primary. Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers are pouring millions into Indiana to try and buy a rubber stamp for their agenda. They may even have help from their candidate himself.

**But if every single person who supports Joe steps up with just $6 today, we 'll be able to take on the special interests and send an advocate for every Hoosier back to Washington.**

**[Will you chip in $6 now to help us fight back against Rep. Mike Braun's $6 million? >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f5/617873347/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180504nd&amount=6")**

Thank you,
Team Donnelly

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2081/7377f838/3ef613a2/51f941f3/617873347/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180504nd&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: Planned Parenthood, defunded?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf7e/2a380d31/8cd3052/f18aeb/3238708132/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf7e/2a380d31/8cd3052/f18aeb/3238708132/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
Anti-abortion groups just hit a new low.
Earlier this week, more than 85 extreme, **anti-health care organizations signed a letter calling on the Trump administration to cut Planned Parenthood and other groups that provide critical health services off from family grants.**
The scariest part? _President Trump is strongly considering it._
[**Team, we can 't let this go unanswered. Please click here to sign our petition and call on the Trump administration to protect access to reproductive health care.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf7e/2a380d31/8cd3052/f18ad4/3238708132/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180504_reprorights_act?source=e20180504_reprorights_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
It gets worse: Kellyanne Conway is pushing the idea, turning critical women's health care into a political football by highlighting Planned Parenthood's support for Democrats, including Hillary Clinton.
For some women, access to reproductive health services can mean life or death. That anyone, let alone the President of the United States, would put health care on the line for political gain is despicable, and it is shameful.
The only way to stop the far-right's attacks on women's health care is to speak out, and to speak loud:
[**Sign your name to make sure that the Trump administration knows that reproductive rights are not a political bargaining chip, and that you stand with Planned Parenthood and family health care providers.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf7e/2a380d31/8cd3052/f18ad4/3238708132/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180504_reprorights_act?source=e20180504_reprorights_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking action on this important issue,
Team Maggie

clean_body: "" "" Hi there, Anti-abortion groups just hit a new low. Earlier this week, more than 85 extreme, anti-health care organizations signed a letter calling on the Trump administration to cut Planned Parenthood and other groups that provide critical health services off from family grants. The scariest part? President Trump is strongly considering it. "" It gets worse: Kellyanne Conway is pushing the idea, turning critical women's health care into a political football by highlighting Planned Parenthood's support for Democrats, including Hillary Clinton. For some women, access to reproductive health services can mean life or death. That anyone, let alone the President of the United States, would put health care on the line for political gain is despicable, and it is shameful. The only way to stop the far-right's attacks on women's health care is to speak out, and to speak loud: "" Thank you for taking action on this important issue, Team Maggie ""

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, APRIL 27TH**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**
**
**
**It’s been an exciting week here in New Hampshire. You can tell “election fever” is starting—right along with Spring fever!**
****
**On Monday, we had RNC Co-Chair Bob Paduchik in state to spend some time with some of our most ardent Trump supporters at a roundtable at the NHIOP followed by a hugely successful cigar reception at the Snow Shoe Club in Concord. Bob shared with us his optimism for the state and the nation.**
****
**On Wednesday, Rudy Giuliani visited. He is a tireless American hero and folks here gave him a warm New Hampshire welcome. He made several media stops, had a roundtable with some of NHRSC’s high dollar donors at the Bedford Village Inn, and then gave an enthusiastic speech at the Castleton in Windham to over 250 folks gathered to support the Senate PAC. He also had dinner at two of NH’s finest establishments, the Tuscan Kitchen and the Copper Door. Rudy is also a cigar enthusiast and stopped at Castro’s in Manchester to pick up some cigars for his trip back to New York. Folks, I mention all the places he visited because these establishments are all owned by folks who support the Republican party – so I encourage you to support them.**
****
**Tonight I’ll speak at the Cheshire County Republican Committee’s annual dinner in Keene and tomorrow I’ll speak with the College Republicans in Portsmouth at the 100 Club. I expect to experience the same kind of enthusiasm as I’ve experienced all week. No matter how the Democrats try to beat us down and obstruct, we won’t let them. We’ve got facts and success on our side and we need to keep talking about that with everyone.**
****
**Next week be on the lookout for my op-ed on Shahassen – as a reminder of just how badly Shaheen and Hassen are playing partisan politics at the expense of New Hampshire taxpayers.**
****

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Op-Ed from NHYR Chair Joe Sweeney on the Second Amendment**
_For this reason, New Hampshire Republicans have defended and strengthened the Second Amendment in New Hampshire._

_In February 2017, Republicans passed and Gov. Chris Sununu signed constitutional carry, repealing the requirement to have a permit to carry in the State of New Hampshire. In fact, that was the first bill our popular governor signed into law._

_In March 2018, New Hampshire House Republicans voted down a parliamentary maneuver by Democratic lawmakers hoping to suspend House rules and introduce legislation to ban bump stocks, raise the age of purchase to 21 and curb gun rights in various other ways. When the left launched its gun-control initiative, Republicans in New Hampshire held the line. And contrary to some rumors, there will be no so-called “Red Flag” legislation as long as Republicans have a say in Concord._

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, APRIL 27TH | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, It’s been an exciting week here in New Hampshire. You can tell “election fever” is starting—right along with Spring fever! ** On Monday, we had RNC Co-Chair Bob Paduchik in state to spend some time with some of our most ardent Trump supporters at a roundtable at the NHIOP followed by a hugely successful cigar reception at the Snow Shoe Club in Concord. Bob shared with us his optimism for the state and the nation. On Wednesday, Rudy Giuliani visited. He is a tireless American hero and folks here gave him a warm New Hampshire welcome. He made several media stops, had a roundtable with some of NHRSC’s high dollar donors at the Bedford Village Inn, and then gave an enthusiastic speech at the Castleton in Windham to over 250 folks gathered to support the Senate PAC. He also had dinner at two of NH’s finest establishments, the Tuscan Kitchen and the Copper Door. Rudy is also a cigar enthusiast and stopped at Castro’s in Manchester to pick up some cigars for his trip back to New York. Folks, I mention all the places he visited because these establishments are all owned by folks who support the Republican party – so I encourage you to support them. Tonight I’ll speak at the Cheshire County Republican Committee’s annual dinner in Keene and tomorrow I’ll speak with the College Republicans in Portsmouth at the 100 Club. I expect to experience the same kind of enthusiasm as I’ve experienced all week. No matter how the Democrats try to beat us down and obstruct, we won’t let them. We’ve got facts and success on our side and we need to keep talking about that with everyone. Next week be on the lookout for my op-ed on Shahassen – as a reminder of just how badly Shaheen and Hassen are playing partisan politics at the expense of New Hampshire taxpayers. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS REPUBLICAN FUTURE SUMMIT NHFRW LILAC LUNCHEON DERBY DAY OF ACTION PHOTOS OF THE WEEK A packed Cigar & Scotch social with RNC Co-Chair Bob Paduchik on Monday! A packed house on Wednesday night for the Senate Republican Majority PAC with Mayor Rudy Giuliani! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week is State Senator Ruth Ward! Senator Ward is a great Republican advocate in Concord, voting this past week to help pass a new $10 million school safety infrastructure fund (which some Democrats opposed). Senator Ward has done so much for the GOP, and we thank her for her leadership! TWEET OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | Op-Ed from NHYR Chair Joe Sweeney on the Second Amendment For this reason, New Hampshire Republicans have defended and strengthened the Second Amendment in New Hampshire. In February 2017, Republicans passed and Gov. Chris Sununu signed constitutional carry, repealing the requirement to have a permit to carry in the State of New Hampshire. In fact, that was the first bill our popular governor signed into law. In March 2018, New Hampshire House Republicans voted down a parliamentary maneuver by Democratic lawmakers hoping to suspend House rules and introduce legislation to ban bump stocks, raise the age of purchase to 21 and curb gun rights in various other ways. When the left launched its gun-control initiative, Republicans in New Hampshire held the line. And contrary to some rumors, there will be no so-called “Red Flag” legislation as long as Republicans have a say in Concord. **NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, MAY 4TH**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**The Spring meeting of the Republican National Committee is this week in Miami. The weather is warm, the sky is blue, and the red wave is coming! Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel delivered spirited remarks to the 168 members of the RNC. Here is an excerpt of her message:**
****
_**“President Trump and Vice President Pence are leading our country into a more prosperous future and there is no bigger champion for the American people than President Donald J. Trump. Our labor market is booming, our nation has over 2.7 million new jobs, and our economy is growing. Consumer confidence is up and African American and Hispanic unemployment rates are at record lows. And let’s not forget about those big, beautiful tax cuts! As a result, 8 in 10 Americans are seeing more money in their paychecks. Over 4 million workers are receiving wage increases and bonuses from companies like AT&T, Comcast, Apple, Costco, Boeing, Walmart, and Bank of America.” Check out [PaycheckPresident.com](PaycheckPresident.com) and hear about real, every day Americans who are benefitting from the President’s commitment to them.**_
****
**As Ronna said in her remarks, “This is a president who ran for office because he cares about real, hardworking Americans. He knows it’s about Main Street –not K Street.”**
****
**Yet the Democrats continue to obstruct and resist – they truly do hate our President more than they love this country. Disappointingly that includes our own federal delegation—who voted against New Hampshire taxpayers when they lockstep voted against historic tax cut legislation. **
****
**Just last week Team Shahassen voted against Mike Pompeo for Secretary of State. Democrats continue to refuse to confirm President Trump’s qualified nominees – with 188 now waiting to be confirmed. Can you imagine how much more we would get done, if we could deliver two Republican representatives to the President in November 2018?**
****
**And while the RNC continues to break records in raising money across the country and building out the strongest ground and data organization than any previous cycle, the Democrats are in debt, struggling to raise money, unable to put forward good candidates, or bring their party together.**
****
**As we go into the mid-term election, we cannot reward partisan, obstructionist behavior. We must work together to stop the destructive behavior of our federal delegation by sending two Republicans to Washington in November. Any one of the candidates in CD1 and CD2 are better than what the Democrats have to offer.**
****
**I am confident that New Hampshire Republicans understand what’s at stake and will deliver real red results in November.**_**Just 187 days to go....**_
****

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Op-Ed from NHYR Chair Joe Sweeney on the Second Amendment**
_For this reason, New Hampshire Republicans have defended and strengthened the Second Amendment in New Hampshire._

_In February 2017, Republicans passed and Gov. Chris Sununu signed constitutional carry, repealing the requirement to have a permit to carry in the State of New Hampshire. In fact, that was the first bill our popular governor signed into law._

_In March 2018, New Hampshire House Republicans voted down a parliamentary maneuver by Democratic lawmakers hoping to suspend House rules and introduce legislation to ban bump stocks, raise the age of purchase to 21 and curb gun rights in various other ways. When the left launched its gun-control initiative, Republicans in New Hampshire held the line. And contrary to some rumors, there will be no so-called “Red Flag” legislation as long as Republicans have a say in Concord._
