clean_body: Due to an email server issue, our last week’s newsletter was re-sent. We apologize for the inconvenience. | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, MAY 4TH | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, The Spring meeting of the Republican National Committee is this week in Miami. The weather is warm, the sky is blue, and the red wave is coming! Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel delivered spirited remarks to the 168 members of the RNC. Here is an excerpt of her message: ** “President Trump and Vice President Pence are leading our country into a more prosperous future and there is no bigger champion for the American people than President Donald J. Trump. Our labor market is booming, our nation has over 2.7 million new jobs, and our economy is growing. Consumer confidence is up and African American and Hispanic unemployment rates are at record lows. And let’s not forget about those big, beautiful tax cuts! As a result, 8 in 10 Americans are seeing more money in their paychecks. Over 4 million workers are receiving wage increases and bonuses from companies like AT&T, Comcast, Apple, Costco, Boeing, Walmart, and Bank of America.” Check out PaycheckPresident.com and hear about real, every day Americans who are benefitting from the President’s commitment to them. As Ronna said in her remarks, “This is a president who ran for office because he cares about real, hardworking Americans. He knows it’s about Main Street –not K Street.” Yet the Democrats continue to obstruct and resist – they truly do hate our President more than they love this country. Disappointingly that includes our own federal delegation—who voted against New Hampshire taxpayers when they lockstep voted against historic tax cut legislation. Just last week Team Shahassen voted against Mike Pompeo for Secretary of State. Democrats continue to refuse to confirm President Trump’s qualified nominees – with 188 now waiting to be confirmed. Can you imagine how much more we would get done, if we could deliver two Republican representatives to the President in November 2018? And while the RNC continues to break records in raising money across the country and building out the strongest ground and data organization than any previous cycle, the Democrats are in debt, struggling to raise money, unable to put forward good candidates, or bring their party together. As we go into the mid-term election, we cannot reward partisan, obstructionist behavior. We must work together to stop the destructive behavior of our federal delegation by sending two Republicans to Washington in November. Any one of the candidates in CD1 and CD2 are better than what the Democrats have to offer. I am confident that New Hampshire Republicans understand what’s at stake and will deliver real red results in November.Just 187 days to go.... Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS NHFRW LILAC LUNCHEON DERBY DAY OF ACTION PHOTOS OF THE WEEK NHGOP Chair Jeanie Forrester speaking to a packed NHFCR Convention in Portsmouth this past Saturday! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week shines on Dan Passen and Ruby Murphy! Dan and Ruby organized a very successful New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans Convention this past weekend, where Dan was**unanimously re-elected as Chairman. Ruby is graduating from SNHU this Spring after spending the last year as NHFCR Executive Director. Thank you both for all you do! TWEETSOF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | | Op-Ed from NHYR Chair Joe Sweeney on the Second Amendment For this reason, New Hampshire Republicans have defended and strengthened the Second Amendment in New Hampshire. In February 2017, Republicans passed and Gov. Chris Sununu signed constitutional carry, repealing the requirement to have a permit to carry in the State of New Hampshire. In fact, that was the first bill our popular governor signed into law. In March 2018, New Hampshire House Republicans voted down a parliamentary maneuver by Democratic lawmakers hoping to suspend House rules and introduce legislation to ban bump stocks, raise the age of purchase to 21 and curb gun rights in various other ways. When the left launched its gun-control initiative, Republicans in New Hampshire held the line. And contrary to some rumors, there will be no so-called “Red Flag” legislation as long as Republicans have a say in Concord. name: Ben Jealous
subject: You're Invited: Debt-Free College Rally with Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
My family was only able to make it out of public housing in Baltimore due to the investments Maryland used to make in public higher education. However, as the war on drugs pushed more and more funding toward mass incarceration, our public colleges and universities faced funding shortfalls year after year.
We would love for you to join us at this event on May 7th with my good friend Senator Bernie Sanders to discuss my plan for debt-free college which I'll be releasing on Monday. **[RSVP here to let us know you're coming.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f4/7ab0e2c4/7fb9f7c7/349a4c2c/2993976072/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/debt-free-college-sanders?source=EMD05048A") **
Let's end this era of student debt and pay for it by ending the era of mass incarceration.
Hope to see you there,
Team Jealous
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f4/7ab0e2c4/7fb9f7c7/349a4c2c/2993976072/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/debt-free-college-sanders?source=EMD05048A")

****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f4/7ab0e2c4/7fb9f7c7/349a4c2f/2993976072/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=EMD05048A")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
